web.title: eSignatures.io - MSP Navigator
web.description: eSignatures.io offers pay-per-document pricing, with features like unlimited templates, users, API, Zapier integration, and bulk sending.
web.markdown:
eSignatures.io

[by eSignatures.io](https://www.msp-navigator.com/vendors/esignaturesio)

[Business Operations](https://www.msp-navigator.com/categories/business-operations) [E-Signature](https://www.msp-navigator.com/categories/e-signature)

## About

eSignatures.io offers pay-per-document pricing, with features like unlimited templates, users, API, Zapier integration, and bulk sending. It supports custom branding, embedded signing, and SMS contracts, making e-signing easy on any device.

Quick Info

[Visit Website](https://esignatures.io/)

web.markdown:
![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/esignatures-logo-with-text-20250923-bdca31d50f0eb6cf62f584d323c555f68e1ad2805d7364a24b7358371be8318e.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/esignatures-logo-420x420-20241117-3ece6f7789ac5ccdd6c5aa95345cec5167dd725d783461dace5b8b7d4b434108.png)

[Sign in](https://esignatures.com/login) [Free trial](https://esignatures.com/#)

[API](https://esignatures.com/docs/api) [Pricing](https://esignatures.com/#) [Sign in](https://esignatures.com/login) [Free trial](https://esignatures.com/#)

[Features](https://esignatures.com/#)[API](https://esignatures.com/docs/api)[Pricing](https://esignatures.com/#)

Sign Smarter,

Stand Out

Send beautifully simple, mobile-perfect contracts in seconds. Your clients will feel the difference.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-can-ueca-1b6ed57a5fe52005ad8b5cf06e967d8eaa3bbced65ad19d836803ef9adc985c9.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-iso-27001-fe7097eda27dc25f88f58c15302fc5bf57dd4357dd2e8d30744ae2eafb3c9593.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-usa-ueta-7e3e28c6456af11d864fa8c7a38c7c136c1e96ca94a7ad7b9760731e291ebd00.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-hipaa-d584d1abbc4a02640d5135d815d8741deac59f7b2396703de729866f17263168.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-eu-eidas-f919dddae5c4319b9c6c795fa70efbabffb24d70c1e60cc772c3f515b71b87b5.png)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/stamp-aus-eta-c8485b51edcfe7b43670ac6c9ce2e1be75612ba6946c9308b73aa5f8096b1e1b.png)

CA UECA Compliant

ISO 27001 Certified

US UETA & ESIGN Act Compliant

HIPAA Compliant

EU eIDAS/GDPR Compliant

AU ET Act Compliant

Your clients will love your

mobile-friendly contracts

Simple, fast signing

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/iphone12-PDF-1703332edb8ba7b23e869fdbaef57bade0a0fec7a2404e4d207e65cd60b1d9f0.jpg)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/iphone12-mobile-friendly-e7af275ab99edce3030e396bc138a5a46bfe71751c0d6450232f22cb98c741c0.jpg)

PDF (legacy)

Responsive

Designed for paper, not mobile

90%+ completion, first try

Pinch-zoom just to read

Perfect on any device

Tiny fields, missed taps

Automation ready

See how it works

Send yourself a test contract

\* Send link to

[Send demo](https://esignatures.com/#)

Pricing

$0.49 per contract

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/tick-3020c90947599f4bcca596cdd06574aa3353b5d95a96393ffe491ded09a514c8.svg)No monthly fees

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/tick-3020c90947599f4bcca596cdd06574aa3353b5d95a96393ffe491ded09a514c8.svg)No usage limits

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/tick-3020c90947599f4bcca596cdd06574aa3353b5d95a96393ffe491ded09a514c8.svg)All features included

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/tick-3020c90947599f4bcca596cdd06574aa3353b5d95a96393ffe491ded09a514c8.svg)Bulk discount available

[Detailed Pricing page](https://esignatures.com/pricing)

Sign upfor afree trial

\* Email

\* Password

I agree to the [ToS](https://esignatures.com/legal/terms-and-conditions.pdf) and [Privacy Policy](https://esignatures.com/legal/privacy-policy.pdf)

Highlighted features

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/api_icon-aee73333a56a20b7be3ac24c5f2bfe4f7d36959ae6e4fe5e62b764122d143b20.svg)

API integration

It's never been easier to integrate with an online signature platform. One simple POST request sends a contract.

[API documentation](https://esignatures.com/docs/api)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/zapier_icon-2eab243b48b39eda16730775cea518075699dd3cdd8e535444276c051122383d.svg)

Zapier integration

Automate your workflow, connect with thousands of apps like Salesforce, Dropbox and more.

[Zapier guide](https://esignatures.com/docs/zapier_guide)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/share_icon-1d4deb1880015bab6bbf205acab38d9ca987f4333972a14afab9e8dbe33a963b.svg)

Contract links

Share a link to your contract page so anyone can sign it. Embed on websites, send in emails, or share with a QR code.

[Contract links](https://esignatures.com/docs/contract_link_guide)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/teams_icon-eebe3389a5150730dca57831bd9fecfd18c55d361a45e1685448ad37776653ec.svg)

SMS contracts

Send contracts directly to mobiles via SMS, and expect lightning fast returns.

Your clients will love it.

[Sending SMS contracts](https://player.vimeo.com/video/538489595?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/wordpress_logo-b93743ceda4d534cff81bd2549efcb1f866a3069f44d269d7fb70b6b15b4c5ec.svg)

WordPress signing

Embed a fully responsive signing page or add a contract signing button to your WordPress site

[Embedded guide](https://esignatures.com/docs/wordpress_guide_embedded)

[Contract button guide](https://esignatures.com/docs/wordpress_guide_button)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/teams_icon-eebe3389a5150730dca57831bd9fecfd18c55d361a45e1685448ad37776653ec.svg)

Bulk sending

Copy-paste the list of signers from your Excel worksheet and bulk send the contracts with ease.

[Bulk sending](https://esignatures.com/docs/bulk_send_guide)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/input_icon-a4a354f16531919a3d7803ad11ced99c9319faf982f1e0d8389fb2273e8c9686.svg)

Signer fields

Add Signer fields to your contracts, so your signers can type in information: tick a checkbox, upload files and more.

[Text input](https://player.vimeo.com/video/531702388?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

[Attaching files](https://player.vimeo.com/video/531704975?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/placeholder-97babfbbebecab9678f6670474f095efd9b636102f01a9f15f9f3ef4809091ef.svg)

Placeholders

Use Placeholders to highlight the text you would like to replace in new contracts.

[Placeholders](https://player.vimeo.com/video/534331009?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

[Placeholders and API](https://player.vimeo.com/video/538488506?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

[Placeholders and Zapier](https://player.vimeo.com/video/538483474?badge=0&autopause=0&player_id=0&app_id=58479&autoplay=1)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/teams_icon-eebe3389a5150730dca57831bd9fecfd18c55d361a45e1685448ad37776653ec.svg)

User management

Manage your users and their access levels within the company

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/branding_icon-4e9625be57bc4a091b874f91ff7f6e79e3d8b2fbac6db2a1d0aa9b8add395e01.svg)

Branding

Your logo and company name is in the center throughout the sign flow. Custom Google fonts and custom email domains are supported.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/scale-5d17d52cb0bb319bacb1a9ce5a08738ccd400b81219f48f2ed4a1cdf887177f9.svg)

Simple pricing

Get to market faster with pay-as-you-go pricing and the freedom to scale up or down without a lock-in subscription plan.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/flag-36489bb247a36715b06f993b833e28f9a6270e6f1aa9a9d4d99e737356414fb5.svg)

25 supported languages

The list of supported languages is continuously growing, currently: CZ, DA, DE, EL, EN, EN-GB, ES, FI, FR, HR, HU, ID, IT, JA, NL, NO, PL, PT, RO, RS, SK, SL, SV, VI, ZH-CN

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/templates_icon-56fd69bd693ccce661061f248a8f95b4077409950df15df51c23cdfbb21ab60c.svg)

Privacy

You can relax when you send contracts to your clients. We don't sell or trade any info. We never approach your clients with marketing emails, and we don't spam you either.

[Privacy Policy](https://esignatures.com/legal/privacy-policy.pdf)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/iso-logo-37c50b49efb6a6825b9ef11ada45a33faad6c257ac2d91423bb9c0a2d821a20b.svg)

Security

We are ISO 27001 certified.

This is the highest level of global information security assurance today, and provides customers assurance that our eSignatures service meets stringent international security standards.

[ISO 27001 register](https://register.jasanz.org/certificate-details/0/2a16039d-353f-4f39-bdd8-f029edcaa657)

[ISO 27001 certificate](https://esignatures.com/legal/iso-27001-certification-2025.pdf)

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/compliant_icon-36086670ca27ac532bdb9d44ce5a86b2062776fcde0e2569afb02aa462e91186.svg)

Act compliant

Contracts issued by eSignatures are legally binding under the U.S. ESIGN Act and UETA, European Union eIDAS, UK, Canada, Australia and more. See below.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/audit_trail_icon-4c6f36e47beff535ed515307558d22c3c03ba0313370bb12929d8c51c4f4f761.svg)

Audit trail

Each document has a comprehensive log of each parties’ name, email address, IP address and a record of the day and time of all activity that occurred.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/aws-logo-436244b977156312b8784399458e63bb2d5e858469952c837d2e30a5164e1c5b.svg)

Choose your data centre

Choose the most suitable data centre to store your contract information: US East (N. Virginia), Canada (Central), Asia Pacific (Sydney), EU (Frankfurt or UK (London).

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/icons/two_factor_auth_icon-981b3bf355f6b707b0ee92ee05ea0a3fafdbf6472eb73678ab63f676d2defafe.svg)

Two-factor identification

Use the built-in Email, SMS, live Photo ID verification to provide a more comprehensive signing process

Partners & Customers about us

Featured in: The best electronic signature apps in 2025

This is a field crammed with different competitors, and telling the good from the bad just from their websites is nearly impossible. We've got recommendations for the right apps to use. We sorted through more than 35 electronic signature apps to find the best eight.

Harry Guinness

Writer, The New York Times, Popular Science, Lifehacker

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/zapier_logo-94f2b4b74510b74f7633b29508f7d736028d93961ba301fd9c88f86522974c1a.png)

Featured in: The Best Electronic Signature Software for 2024

We picked eSignatures because it is a lightweight signature tool for fast signatures.

At an affordable rate eSignatures has to offer nearly everything to make document and workflow management a breeze. That includes SMS-based contracts, bulk sending, integrations and even more: custom branding can tailor your documents to your company’s style, helping you stand out to your customers.

Eric Rosenberg

Finance, travel, and technology writer.

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/investopedia-logo-up-1d3938174aeeb74b3492e8f09ac36bb1411000301d97eafcdb2901feec9ff535.jpg)

Their product has been rock solid, and their customer support phenomenal !

eSignatures was just what our business needed - a simple integration to scale document signing for a multitude of uses.

Their product has been rock solid, and their customer support phenomenal !

Graham Biehl

Co-founder, Clubspot

![](https://cdncf.esignatures.com/assets/homepage/clubspot-logo-c1fea1c9e8913b9fa1485b7e979a052be174af42b52250946d4dadb4731d7fa8.png)

Frequently Asked Questions

Does eSignatures issue legally binding contracts?

Yes. Contracts issued with eSignatures are legally binding for almost all common business and personal transactions in most countries. eSignatures complies with the requirements of the U.S. ESIGN Act, UETA, HIPAA, 21 CFR Part 11, the European Union eIDAS Regulation (Electronic Signature level, not Advanced or Qualified), the Canadian UECA, the UK eIDAS and ECA, the Australian Electronic Transactions Act (ETA), the New Zealand Electronic Transactions Act (ETA), and the South African ECTA. eSignatures is also designed to support GDPR-compliant processing and storage of personal data.

How does eSignatures handle security and privacy?

eSignatures is designed for serious security and privacy without unnecessary complexity. All contracts include tamper-evident audit trails, data is handled under ISO 27001-based security practices, and personal data is processed in line with GDPR principles. eSignatures does not sell contract data to third parties, and the focus is on keeping documents safe, traceable and easy to access when needed.

How do recipients sign documents with eSignatures?

Recipients receive a unique link by email or SMS. They tap the link, review the contract in a clean, mobile-friendly layout, fill in any required fields, and tap “Sign” to complete the process. Once all required parties have signed, everyone receives a finalised copy and the full audit trail is stored with the contract.

Does eSignatures work on mobile devices?

Yes. eSignatures is designed to be mobile-first. Contracts are displayed as responsive, readable pages instead of static PDFs, so text is easy to read, fields are easy to tap, and signers do not need to pinch-zoom or scroll awkwardly. This makes the signing process faster and clearer for both customers and staff, especially when most people sign on their phones.

Does eSignatures use PDF files to sign contracts?

No. eSignatures deliberately avoids using rigid PDF files for the signing experience. Instead, contracts are created as editable, mobile-friendly templates that adapt to different screen sizes. This makes documents easier to read, reduces errors, and avoids many of the common mobile issues associated with traditional PDF forms.

Is eSignatures suitable for high-volume teams?

Yes. eSignatures is built for teams that send contracts every day, from dozens up to thousands per month. The dashboard, templates and Contract Links are designed to stay fast and usable at scale, so operations, insurance, health and SaaS teams can keep sending and tracking large volumes of contracts without adding unnecessary complexity.

How can I tell the status of a document sent for signing through eSignatures?

Every contract appears in a real-time dashboard where you can see whether it has been sent, viewed, signed, or completed. You can open any contract to review the full audit trail of the signing process, adjust content or recipient details when needed, and send reminders to recipients.

Does eSignatures have an API and integrations?

Yes. eSignatures provides a clean REST API for embedding signing into your own product, along with webhooks for tracking status changes such as “sent”, “viewed”, and “signed”. eSignatures also connects to automation tools like Zapier, so you can trigger sending, tracking, and storage of signed documents without building everything from scratch. The same transparent, pay-per-use pricing applies whether you send via the dashboard, API or automations.

Do I need a sales call or long contract to get started?

No. You can create an account, test with sample contracts, and start sending real documents without talking to a sales team or signing a long-term contract. eSignatures uses transparent, pay-per-use pricing, so you only pay for the contracts you send, and you can scale up or down at any time without changing plans or negotiating new tiers.

How does pricing work, including the API?

Pricing is simple and usage-based. You pay a flat fee per contract sent, whether you use the dashboard, the API, or automations, and there are no monthly subscription fees or setup charges. Optional SMS delivery is charged separately per message. For current rates and currency options, see the Pricing page.

What languages does eSignatures support?

eSignatures supports signing in multiple languages and handles most Unicode character sets throughout the document flow. Currently supported interface languages include: Chinese (simplified), Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, English, English (UK), Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Romanian, Serbian, Slovak, Slovenian, Spanish, Swedish, Vietnamese

Can I use my own branding?

Yes. eSignatures allows you to use your own logo and customise key parts of the experience so that customers see your brand, not ours. Signature requests and notification emails can be branded with your company identity to keep the signing process consistent with your existing customer journey.

How does eSignatures.com compare to DocuSign?

DocuSign is a large enterprise platform with broad feature sets and subscription tiers. eSignatures focuses on a simpler, mobile-first signing experience, a clean developer-friendly API, and transparent pay-per-use pricing, designed for teams that send documents regularly and want less complexity.

For a detailed breakdown see the [DocuSign alternatives page](https://esignatures.com/docs/docusign_alternatives)

What is an electronic signature?

An electronic signature is an electronic sound, symbol, or process, attached to or logically associated with a contract or record, that a person uses with the intent to sign. In practice, electronic signatures are used every day for offer letters, sales contracts, permission slips, rental and lease agreements, liability waivers, financial documents, and many other agreements. When used correctly, they are legally binding in most business and personal transactions around the world.
